title: stipa aliena var. macrocarpa
intro: Stipa aliena var. macrocarpa, also known as the Chinese needle grass, is a type of grass native to China and Mongolia. It has been used in traditional Chinese medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant effects. The plant is believed to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating pain, and improving digestion, although more research is needed to confirm these effects. Stipa aliena var. macrocarpa can be prepared into teas, infusions, and decoctions for use in herbal medicine, with some traditional practitioners also using it in combination with other herbs for enhanced benefits.
